_note: Polls planned for after launch (post-2026-05-23). Not loaded by /polls or any API route — purely a record of upcoming votes so they're not forgotten. Move an entry into src/data/polls.json (and update POLLS_CLOSE_AT) when re-opening voting.

polls.question: Show Lands claim outlines on the BlueMap?
polls.context: Currently disabled at launch — claims aren't fed to BlueMap. Pros: visible territory, easier to find friends/towns. Cons: makes outlaws' homes findable, undermines the 'hidden bunker' play style. Legend block on /map is commented out pending this vote.

options.label: Only show federated nations, not solo claims
No — keep claims off the public map

polls.question: When should the End unlock?
polls.context: Locked at launch regardless of the pre-launch vote. Re-vote with grounded context once the meta settles.

polls.question: Which quests plugin should we use?
polls.context: Quests won 'yes' pre-launch but didn't ship day one. Run this once we've shortlisted candidates.

polls.question: Which jobs plugin should we use?
polls.context: Jobs won 'later-after-economy' pre-launch. Run once the economy direction is decided.
